message:
chore: update Cargo.lock to match pinned dependency revisions

Lockfile regenerated to reflect the exact rev-pinned asupersync and
rich_rust dependencies from the previous Cargo.toml patch change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
